resolutionReason: Human review found a generic seated-calf LOW overgeneralization; confusion between internal-force normalization and exercise resistance; missing external-load research for calf, squat, unilateral knee-dominant, and lunge exercises; split-squat variant ambiguity; a non-practical 60-degree squat anchor; misuse of a study-specific PFJ composite index as generic COMPRESSION; failure to separate peak, impulse, loading rate, and impact; cross-metric interpretation risk; and no upper-limb coverage.
resolutionNotes: The original request payload remains immutable. This resolution is not a rejection of every source measurement and is not a human approval.
